stories.title: Every melody opens a new chapter.
stories.lead: Magic Stories Records is a growing library of sounds at the crossroads of electronic, organic, deep and melodic house, where every release adds its own page to one larger story.

authors.title: Every artist writes their own chapter.
authors.lead: Their music, emotion and sound shape Magic Stories Records, carrying the story forward release after release.

podcasts.title: Every mix, a new chapter.
podcasts.lead: The Magic Stories Records podcast series, hour-long journeys guided by the label's artists, friends and selectors from around the world. Electronic, organic, deep and melodic house gathered into stories that carry the MSR world beyond the releases themselves.

submit.title: Send us your story.
submit.lead: Every release begins with a first listen. If you make music at the crossroads of electronic, organic, deep or melodic house, emotional, spacious and patiently built, we'd love to hear where your story leads.
submit.rule1Body: Finished, or close to it. Private SoundCloud links work best, please, no attachments or zips.
submit.rule2Body: Who you are, where your sound comes from, and one link to wherever you live online.
submit.rule3Body: We listen for melodic and organic house with a heart, music that paints a place we haven't been yet.
submit.footnote: We listen to everything that arrives. If your story resonates with ours, we'll write back, it can take a little while, and silence never means your music wasn't heard.

library.title: The Magic Library
library.lead: The shared space of the MSR community. A place for posts, links, musical discoveries and short stories. Drop a track from YouTube, SoundCloud or X and show what's playing in your world.
library.empty: The Library is still empty. Write the first chapter.

account.leadIn: Set your name and avatar, this is how others will see you in the Library.
account.leadOut: Sign in with your Google account to write chapters, like and reply.

auth.signInPrompt: Sign in to write your chapter.

profile.errUploadProfile: Picture uploaded, but it didn't save to your profile.
profile.errUsername: Username: 3–20 characters, lowercase letters, digits and underscore.
profile.avatarHint: JPG or PNG, up to ~2 MB.
